subcodes.first_line: We have remembered all who have turned unto the All-Informed One, as doth attest His sovereign Word [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد ذکرنا کل من اقبل الی الفرد الخبیر قد شهد بذلک کلمه الله المطاعه التی بها
subcodes.subjects: @Manifestation of God speaking in the voice of Divinity, @praise and encouragement, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
